## Validation

## Launch Safety

- [ ] No real secrets, private keys, `.env` files, generated build outputs, or large ZK artifacts are included.
- [ ] Public docs still describe Continuity Protocol as a developer preview, not production-ready, not audited, and not mainnet-approved.
- [ ] `conformance:mainnet` remains evidence-gated.
